title: Sheet Music Folders Choral Binder: Piano Music Folder Writable with Pockets 40 Sleeves 80 Pages - A4 Size Sheet Music Organizer for Choir Singer Band Stage Performance Sheet Music Holder
features: 80 Pages Large Capacity: This music folder stores 80 sheets with 40 sleeves; The folder for sheet music includes front back pockets for metronomes and pens; Designed as piano music folder for conservatory students or Choral Binder for orchestras; Secures music notes folder collections from loss

Spiral Binder 180 Degree View: Professional sheet music folder with 180° flat-lay spiral design; High-tension coils ensure smooth page turns; Perfect music binder for grand piano stands; A music portfolio folder essential for composers

Directly Writable Music Folder: Annotate sheets without removal in this music folders with pockets; Anti glare piano sheet binder sleeves reduce eye strain; Preferred Piano Folder Organizer for rehearsal annotations
Waterproof and Reusable: High quality PP music score binder survives rain and spills; Frosted edges on choir binder prevent hand fatigue; Rounded corners protect piano music storage contents
Widely Application: From choral performance folder to piano book storage; This black music folder for choir suits all instruments; Luxury music portfolio ideal for special occasions
description: Product Description Musfunny PP sheet music folder stable placement & spring bound for easy turning Fit Letter Size: A4--210mm×297mm Musfunny Write Directly On The Note Page The protective sleeves of the music folder use top and bottom to fix the music sheets. So you can write directly on the pages without taking out the sheets. Easy to Turning Sheet The music binder can be unfolded 180 degrees to keep your partitions at the right angle. Rounded Corners Piano folder has rounded corners, so it won't scratch your fingers when you flip it. Double-Sided Design With double-sided design, you can have more storage space. Easy Viewing This sheet music folder can lay flat on the music stand, which offers a comfortable viewing.
